title: Simplify "All Portal Logins" column headers for member-facing view
description:
Customer feedback from KESB-145 (org 9624): column headers on the "All Portal Logins" page are confusing.

**Goal:** Rename four column headers in `CredentialsTable` to plain language that customers understand.

**Changes:**

* "Approval" → "Setup Status"
* "Concurrency" → "Max Uses"
* "Active Locks" → "In Use" (add tooltip explaining N / max)
* "Health" → "Last Verified"

**File:** `apps/web-app/src/components/credentials/credentials-table.tsx`

**Acceptance criteria:**

* All four headers renamed
* "In Use" column has a tooltip explaining the N / max format
* No logic changes — pure presentation
* Write-back comment posted to KESB-145
